fixes.description: Vibe history pushed on initial mount
fixes.fix: Wrapped history.push() and subsequent localStorage/state updates in `if (!isInitialMount)` — reuses the isInitialMount variable already defined 4 lines above for the streak counter.

fixes.description: isTouchDevice evaluated at module scope — stale on hybrid devices
fixes.fix: Removed module-scope constant; added `const isTouchDevice = useMemo(() => ..., [])` as the first line inside the App component so it evaluates fresh per render cycle.

fixes.description: ProgressBar rendered even when API provides no progress value
fixes.fix: normalize() now returns `null` (not `0`) for missing progress. ProgressBar is conditionally rendered only when `worker.progress !== null`.
Expanded to 18 quips using vibe state ('crushing', 'on-fire', 'in-flow', 'slow-day', 'after-hours'), errorCount, workingWorkers.length, isLoneSurvivor, isFullSync, isFullIdle.
